content:
# Numbers Chapter 8 — The SOPHIA Bible (Consensus)
**Arbiter:** SOPHIA | **In council with:** EMET, LOGOS, PNEUMA
**Source Manuscript:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 157–158; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pa_0118–0119 (LXX) | **Source Images:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_008_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_008_page_002.jpg`; `source-texts/greek-OT-LXX/NUM_008_vaticanus_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_008_vaticanus_page_002.jpg`

---

## The Arrangement of the Lamps (vv. 1–4)

**8:1** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**8:2** "Speak to Aaron and say to him: 'When you set up the lamps, the seven lamps shall give their light toward the front of the lampstand.'"

**8:3** And Aaron did so; he set up its lamps toward the front of the lampstand, as YHWH had commanded Moses.

**8:4** And this was the workmanship of the lampstand: hammered work of gold, from its base to its flowers it was hammered work. According to the pattern that YHWH had shown Moses, so he made the lampstand.

---

## The Purification and Consecration of the Levites (vv. 5–22)

**8:5** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**8:6** "Take the Levites from among the Sons of Israel and cleanse them.

**8:7** And thus you shall do to them to cleanse them: sprinkle upon them water of purification, and let them pass a razor over all their flesh, and let them wash their garments, and so they shall be clean.

**8:8** And they shall take a young bull with its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, and a second young bull you shall take for a sin offering.

**8:9** And you shall bring the Levites before the Tent of Meeting, and you shall assemble the whole congregation of the Sons of Israel.

**8:10** And you shall bring the Levites before YHWH, and the Sons of Israel shall lay their hands upon the Levites.

**8:11** And Aaron shall present the Levites before YHWH as a wave offering from the Sons of Israel, and they shall be for performing the service of YHWH.

**8:12** And the Levites shall lay their hands upon the heads of the bulls; and offer the one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering to YHWH, to make atonement for the Levites.

**8:13** And you shall set the Levites before Aaron and before his sons, and present them as a wave offering to YHWH.

**8:14** And you shall separate the Levites from among the Sons of Israel, and the Levites shall be mine.

**8:15** And after that the Levites shall come in to serve the Tent of Meeting. And you shall cleanse them and present them as a wave offering.

**8:16** For they are wholly given to me from among the Sons of Israel; in place of every one that opens the womb, the firstborn of all the Sons of Israel, I have taken them for myself.

**8:17** For every firstborn among the Sons of Israel is mine, both man and beast. On the day I struck every firstborn in the land of Egypt, I consecrated them for myself.

**8:18** And I have taken the Levites in place of every firstborn among the Sons of Israel.

**8:19** And I have given the Levites as a gift to Aaron and to his sons from among the Sons of Israel, to perform the service of the Sons of Israel in the Tent of Meeting, and to make atonement for the Sons of Israel, so that there shall be no plague among the Sons of Israel when the Sons of Israel draw near to the sanctuary."

**8:20** And Moses and Aaron and the whole congregation of the Sons of Israel did to the Levites according to all that YHWH had commanded Moses concerning the Levites; so the Sons of Israel did to them.

**8:21** And the Levites purified themselves and washed their garments, and Aaron presented them as a wave offering before YHWH, and Aaron made atonement for them to cleanse them.

**8:22** And after that the Levites came in to perform their service in the Tent of Meeting before Aaron and before his sons. As YHWH had commanded Moses concerning the Levites, so they did to them.

---

## The Age of Levitical Service (vv. 23–26)

**8:23** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**8:24** "This is what pertains to the Levites: from twenty-five years old and upward he shall come to serve in the host of the service of the Tent of Meeting.

**8:25** And from the age of fifty years he shall withdraw from the host of the service, and shall serve no more.

**8:26** He may minister with his brothers in the Tent of Meeting to keep the charge, but he shall do no service. Thus you shall do to the Levites concerning their charges."

---

## Council Notes

SOPHIA evaluated all twenty-six verses of Numbers 8 across the three translator renderings. The Leningrad Codex (pp. 157–158) and Vaticanus (pa_0118–0119) were consulted for every point of dispute. The MT and LXX are in close agreement throughout this chapter, with no significant textual variants affecting translation.

**General principles applied:** (1) Preserve "And" at the start of verses per binding convention for conjunctions. (2) Maintain "Sons of Israel" throughout. (3) Use "YHWH" transliterated. (4) Prefer formal register that preserves Hebrew structure while producing clear English. (5) "Sin offering" retained over "purification offering" for khattat when designating the sacrifice, as the traditional term is well-established and reflects the Hebrew root; "water of purification" retained for mei khattat following the functional sense attested in the LXX (hydor hagnismou).

**Key decisions:** v. 2: "set up" chosen over EMET's hyper-literal "in your causing to go up" and PNEUMA's expanded paraphrase; v. 7: "and so they shall be clean" blends LOGOS's "and they shall be clean" with PNEUMA's connective "and so"; v. 8: "sin offering" over PNEUMA's "purification offering"; v. 11: "present" chosen as a mediating verb between EMET's "wave" and LOGOS's "offer"; v. 16: "wholly given" follows LOGOS for the emphatic netunim netunim doubling; v. 19: "as a gift" follows LOGOS/PNEUMA over EMET's "as given-ones"; v. 21: "purified themselves" follows LOGOS/PNEUMA over EMET's "purified-themselves-from-sin"; v. 24: singular "he shall come" preserves MT's singular verb form; v. 26: "minister with his brothers" follows EMET/LOGOS over PNEUMA's "assist his fellow Levites."

Full verse-by-verse comparison of all disagreements is recorded in `disagreements/NUM_008.md`.
